parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Scheduled Events

actor "Recording Staff" as RS
actor Coach
collections "IP/Mobile Cams" as Cams
collections "Consumer Apps" as Apps
participant "Security Gateway" as SG
control "Control Domain\n(win10/linux)" as CD
participant "Streaming Service\n(encoder)" as SS
entity "Media\n(mediaID)" as Media
participant "Transfer Service" as TS

Apps -> SG : authenticate(ID)
SG --> Apps : return(token)

Cams -> CD : register(endpoint)
Apps -> CD : register(token, priority)

RS -> CD : createEvent(configuration{description, sources, consumers{priorities}})
CD --> CD : create(newEvent)
activate CD

RS -> CD : start(newEvent)
CD -> SS : encode()
CD --> Apps : notify(recording)

RS -> CD : stop(newEvent)
deactivate CD

CD -> SS : saveAs(mediaID)
SS -> Media : save(mediaID)

CD -> TS : host(mediaID, consumers{token, priority})
CD --> Apps : notify(newMediaAvailable, mediaID, transferServiceEndpoint)

alt auto-download enabled
    Apps -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> Apps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
else manual-download enabled
    Coach -> Apps : showMedia(token)
    Apps -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> Apps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
end

@enduml
```
